title: poa scabra var. hybrida
intro: Poa scabra var. hybrida, commonly known as rough bluegrass or hybrid rough bluegrass, is a type of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial actions. The health benefits of Poa scabra var. hybrida include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
